code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_current = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut output = ""
  mut first = true

  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        is_ws = false
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_current = true
      else if b == 45 and not has_current
        is_ws = false
        sign = -1
        has_current = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if has_current
        let value = current * sign
        if not has_prev or value != prev
          if first
            output = "#{value}"
            first = false
          else
            output = "#{output} #{value}"
          end
          prev = value
          has_prev = true
        end
        current = 0
        sign = 1
        has_current = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println(output)
end
